versions.version_description: Please note: this song is played with a Capo on the first fret using the chords below to sound like the recorded album version. The progression is played throughout the entire song. I occasionally change the strum pattern between the two shown to add variation/maintain interest.
All chord voicings included are as heard on the original recording.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Fmaj7[/ch] 

[Verse]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]  
A lonely mother gazining out of the window[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Staring at her son that she just can't touch[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                           [ch]G[/ch]
If at any time he's in a jam she'll be by his side[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But he doesn't realize he hurts her so much[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]
But all the praying just ain't helping at all[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Cuz he can't seem to keep his self out of trouble[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C[/ch]
So he goes out and he makes his money[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
The best way he knows how[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bb[/ch]                    [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]   
Another body layin cold in the gutter[/tab]

Listen to me

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]   
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But I think you're moving too fast[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
Little precious has a natural obsession[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
For temptation but he just can't see[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
She gives him loving that his body[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Can't handle but all he can say[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Is "baby is good to me"[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]               
One day he goes and take a glimpse in the mirror[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But he doesn't recognize his own face[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
His health is fading and he doesn't know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
3 letters took him to his final resting place... [/tab]

Y'all don't you hear me

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]   
Don't go chasing waterfalls[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Please stick to the rivers[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
And the lakes that you're used to[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I know that you're gonna have it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
Your way or nothing at all[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
But I think your moving too fast(2x)[/tab]
